zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Peverell於1075年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾布時，她的父親Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington15歲，母親Elise Adeliza de Lascelles17歲。她於大約1107年與Sir Fulk "The Bold" FitzWarin de Metz在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1178年在法國o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福阿爾比尼享年104歲。

nameMeanings.name: Peverell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Peverell was born in 1075, in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington, was 15 and her mother, Elise Adeliza de Lascelles, was 17. She married Sir Fulk "The Bold" FitzWarin de Metz about 1107, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died about 1178, in Albigny, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 104.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Peverell est née en 1075, à Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Elise Adeliza de Lascelles, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Fulk "The Bold" FitzWarin de Metz environ 1107, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1178, à Albigny, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 104 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Peverell 1075 in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington 15 und ihre Mutter Elise Adeliza de Lascelles 17. Sie hat um 1107 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Fulk "The Bold" FitzWarin de Metz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb um 1178 im Alter von 104 Jahren in Albigny, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Peverellが1075年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボウルンで生まれた時，父Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittingtonは15歳，母Elise Adeliza de Lascellesは17歳であった。約1107年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンでSir Fulk "The Bold" FitzWarin de Metzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1178年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-サボイアルビグニーで104歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Peverell(이)가 1075년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 부른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elise Adeliza de Lascelles(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1107년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 Sir Fulk "The Bold" FitzWarin de Metz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1178년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 하테-사보이 알비그니에서 104세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Peverell nasceu em 1075, em Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Elise Adeliza de Lascelles, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Fulk "The Bold" FitzWarin de Metz aproximadamente 1107, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1178, em Albigny, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 104 anos.

ro.North Bradford, Shropshire, England, Uni: North Bradford, Shropshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Peverell родилась в 1075 г. в местности бурн, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Elise Adeliza de Lascelles, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Fulk "The Bold" FitzWarin de Metz около 1107 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла около 1178 г. в местности албигни, хауте-савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 104 лет.
